title: Apparent Death.
content:
WEEP, maiden, weep here o'er the tomb of Love;

    He died of nothing by mere chance was slain.
    But is he really dead? oh, that I cannot prove:

    A nothing, a mere chance, oft gives him life again.
meaning:
Johann Wolfgang von Goethe's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Apparent Death."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
